# Abhinav Ayush

> Sr. Founding Engineer & Full Stack Developer

## About

Abhinav Ayush is a Sr. Founding Engineer and Full Stack Developer with 5+ years of experience building products from zero to one. He specializes in AI-powered platforms, scalable cloud infrastructure, and full-stack web and mobile applications.

## Current Role

- Sr. Founding Engineer at Tryflume.ai (Oct 2024 — Present)
- Single-handedly architected 12+ microservices, 5 frontend apps, and all GCP infrastructure
- Helped close $3M+ in pre-seed funding during Hf0 residency

## Previous Experience

- SDE 2 at American Express (Sep 2022 — Oct 2024): Lead UI Engineer for Corporate Transaction Compliance Tool
- SDE 1 at BrightMoney (Jan 2022 — Aug 2022): CBW Bank integration, Plaid SDK integration
- UI Mobile Developer at OneDirect/GupShup (Sep 2021 — Jan 2022): iOS & Android SDKs

## Technical Skills

- Frontend: React.js, React Native, TypeScript, Next.js, Flutter, TailwindCSS, Redux/RTK Query
- Backend: Python, FastAPI, Node.js, REST API, WebSockets
- Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Atlas Search, Vector Search, Firebase, Redis
- Cloud/DevOps: GCP, Cloud Run, Cloud Tasks, GCS, Docker, CI/CD, GitHub Actions
- AI/ML: OpenAI, Google Gemini, Google ADK, LangChain, Vector Embeddings, Semantic Search
- Integrations: Stripe, HubSpot, Plaid, Customer.io, D&B, Slack Webhooks

## Education

- Bachelor of Engineering — Nitte Meenakshi Institute of Technology, Bangalore (2021)
- XII (CBSE) — Delhi Public School, Bhilai (2017)
